title: Hor Taew Tak 6
original_title: หอแต๋วแตก แหกต่อไม่รอแล้วนะ
overview: Taew and friends are invited to a mansion which the mansion owner is choosing the new landlord. To win the mansion award, they have to dress up in Indian clothes and pretend to be Indian.
